revision.comment: Bot: Reformatted page - moved categories, interwikis, DEFAULTSORT, and removed duplicates. [[{page.name}]]
Bot: tidy & size tag (2 members)
Text replacement - "(?<!<noinclude>)\{\{\s*[dD]raft categories\|([^}]+)\}\}(?!<\/noinclude>)" to "<noinclude>{{Draft categories|\1}}</noinclude> "
Bot: remove self-membership
Bot: tag as Tier 0 category
Bot: confirm enwiki category & retag
Text replacement - "↵↵" to " "
Text replacement - "[[Category:confirmed enwiki categories]]" to "[[en:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]][[category:confirmed enwiki categories]]"
Bot: tidy cats/interwikis, add JA text & EN link
revision.text:
{{EstcatCountryDecade|Japan}} <noinclude>{{Draft categories|
}} [[Category:1290s establishments in Asia|Japan]] [[Category:a from {{NAMESPACE}}</noinclude> ]] [[Category:Categories with 2 members]] [[category:confirmed enwiki categories]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories]] [[Category:Uncategorized categories]] [[Category:year categories]] [[en:Category:1290s establishments in Japan]] [[Category:1290s establishments in Asia|Japan]] [[Category:a from {{NAMESPACE}}</noinclude> ]] [[Category:Categories with 2 members]] [[category:confirmed enwiki categories]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories]] [[Category:Uncategorized categories]] [[Category:year categories]]

revision.comment: Bot: remove obsolete category Confirmed enwiki categories
Bot: tidy cats/IWs, add JA prose & tracking
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: remove obsolete category Categories with Japanese origin and translated names
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: remove obsolete category Tier 1 Categories
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: remove obsolete category Uncategorized categories
Bot: remove obsolete category Year categories
Bot: move cats/inter-wikis/translated-page to bottom
Bot: remove empty section(s)
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
Bot: add wikidata links from interwikis (Q30708897)
Bot: remove [[Category:categories missing wikidata]] (has wikidata link)
Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
Bot: reorganize categories (alphabetical, deduplicated, moved to bottom)

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "{{Draft categories|↵}}" to ""
